content: Recharts requires 'use client'; it cannot render in RSC. ResponsiveContainer measures parent and renders width/height 0 if parent has no explicit height, producing 'width(0) and height(0)' warnings and blank charts, common under Suspense/dynamic import before layout settles. Fix: give parent explicit height (height={300}), avoid width=100% height=50% without sized parent. SSR of Recharts can cause hydration mismatch; common pattern is next/dynamic ssr:false wrapper.
